svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/143.0.0.0 Safari/537.36 OPR/127.0.0.0" version="29.6.0" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Seite-1" id="2HikQsy9RP_W8zVC4SgY"> <mxGraphModel dx="2848" dy="1556" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="2" parent="1" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;" value="Input configuration
base path, YOLO model path, image path, output directory" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="126" width="260" x="8" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="3" parent="1" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;" value="Load image (cv2.imread)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="54" width="239" x="318" y="136" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4" parent="1" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;" value="File not found error" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="54" width="201" x="705" y="72" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="5" parent="1" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;" value="YOLO Pose Estimator (YoloPoseEstimator)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="78" width="260" x="675" y="176" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="6" parent="1" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;" value="No keypoints detected" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="54" width="221" x="1097" y="8" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="7" parent="1" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;" value="Visualization: draw keypoints" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="78" width="260" x="1077" y="112" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8" parent="1" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;" value="Visualization: draw bounding boxes" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="78" width="260" x="1077" y="240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="9" parent="1" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;" value="Depth Estimator (DepthAnything3Estimator)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="78" width="260" x="675" y="614" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="10" parent="1" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;" value="Associate keypoints with depth (_ensure_keypoint_depths)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="102" width="260" x="1077" y="438" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="11" parent="1" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;" value="Compute camera-space 3D coordinates (compute_camera_coordinates)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="102" width="287" x="1505" y="368" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="12" parent="1" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;" value="Compute world-space 3D coordinates (compute_world_coordinates)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="102" width="275" x="1889" y="298" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="13" parent="1" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;" value="Console / logs" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="54" width="161" x="2301" y="258" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="14" parent="1" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;" value="keypoints_visualization.jpg saved to output directory" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="78" width="260" x="1519" y="112" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="15" parent="1" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;" value="bounding_boxes_visualization.jpg saved to output directory" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="78" width="306" x="1496" y="240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="16" parent="1" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;" value="DepthEstimationResult (depth map, isMetric, intrinsics, extrinsics, optional confidence)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="126" width="260" x="1077" y="590" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="17" parent="1" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;" value="3D GLB export written under output directory" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="78" width="260" x="1077" y="766" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="18" parent="1" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;" value="PoseEstimationResult + DepthEstimationResult.depth" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="78" width="270" x="1514" y="520" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="19" parent="1" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;" value="KeypointDepth3D list + intrinsics matrix K" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="78" width="260" x="1897" y="450" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="20" parent="1" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;" value="KeypointDepth3D list with X,Y,Z + extrinsics (world-to-camera)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="102" width="260" x="2251" y="362" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="21" edge="1" parent="1" source="2" style="curved=1;startArrow=none;endArrow=block;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;" target="3" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="616" y="99" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="23" edge="1" parent="1" source="3" box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
